data.title: 10th Anniversary RISE Festival in Las Vegas celebrated as beautiful, magical, and meaningful, with artists and guests calling it "life-changing and surreal".
data.description: Participants and attendees are raving about the three-night affair in Las Vegas, labeling it as "life-changing" and "surreal." Taking place from October 9th onwards, sentiments like "The most unforgettable experience of my life," "I will remember RISE forever," and "The most magical thing I have ever seen" were echoed by excited individuals at the event. The positive feedback indicates a memorable time for all involved, with a range of visual assets capturing the essence of the affair.

data.title: NW Natural Holdings raises dividend to 49.25 cents/share, 70th consecutive increase. Annual rate now $1.97/share.
data.description: A company based in Portland, Oregon, Northwest Natural Holding Company (NYSE: NWN) announced an increase in quarterly dividends to 49.25 cents per share on common stock. Shareholders of record on Oct. 31, 2025, will receive the dividend on Nov. 14, 2025. The indicated annual dividend rate now stands at $1.97 per share. NW Natural Holdings operates in the energy sector and is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NWN.

data.title: CUPE members at Ontario Health atHome delay return to office as management postpones plan, pending workspace review.
data.description: In Toronto, CUPE members at Ontario Health atHome have successfully halted Doug Ford’s immediate return-to-office mandate. The management sent out an internal memo stating that the plan to return to the office is suspended until further review of workspace arrangements for both Ontario Health atHome and Ontario Health staff. This decision comes as a relief to the CUPE members, as they continue to advocate for safer working conditions. The temporary halt in the return-to-office plan affects a significant number of employees, including those from Ontario Health atHome and Ontario Health, prompting a sense of accomplishment among the union members.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Semler Scientific investors from March 10, 2021 to April 15, 2025. Contact to discuss options.
data.description: James Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses in Semler Scientific to reach out to him directly to explore potential options. If you experienced losses in Semler Scientific within the period of March 10, 2021, to April 15, 2025 and are interested in discussing your circumstances, please contact him for further assistance.

data.title: Celltrion's EYDENZELT biosimilar of EYLEA gets FDA approval for macular diseases, aiming to enter U.S. ophthalmology market.
data.description: The medication EYDENZELT® has received approval for treating patients with neovascular (wet) age-related macular degeneration (wAMD), macular edema after retinal vein occlusion (RVO), diabetic macular edema (DME), and diabetic retinopathy (DR). Celltrion intends to venture into the U.S. ophthalmology sector to make this treatment available.

data.title: St. Matthew's Parish School reveals campus restoration plans for Fall 2026 in Santa Monica, CA. 100+ attendees present.
data.description: Detailed site plans and renderings for the restoration of the campus were presented at a community event in Santa Monica, California on October 9, 2025. The event drew a crowd of families, faculty, staff, and parishioners eager to see the future of St. Matthew's Parish School. The comprehensive plans showcased are set to be implemented in time for the School's Fall 2026 academic year.

data.title: Investors of V.F. Corporation (VFC) facing losses may contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for options. Call if affected between Oct 30, 2023, and May 20, 2025.
data.description: Investors who experienced losses in VFC between October 30, 2023, and May 20, 2025 are urged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson to reach out directly to him. If you fall into this category and wish to explore your legal options, contact him at the provided number.

data.title: RE/MAX Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: RMAX) to report Q3 results on Oct. 30, 2025. Leading real estate franchisor and parent company.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, RE/MAX Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:RMAX), the parent company of REMAX and Motto Mortgage, a leading real estate brokerage franchisor and the sole national mortgage brokerage franchise brand in the U.S., is scheduled to disclose its financial information. This company is known globally and operates in the real estate sector.

data.title: Bitcoin billionaire Arthur Hayes forecasts end of BTC 4-year cycle, cites increased money supply as boon for digital assets.
data.description: Arthur Hayes, a prominent figure in the crypto industry, has made a bold prediction regarding Bitcoin's future. Hayes believes that the traditional four-year cycle of Bitcoin is coming to an end, attributing this change to the potential benefits digital assets will experience due to an increased money supply. This prediction carries weight as Hayes is well-respected in the crypto community and has closely followed Bitcoin's trends. His insight suggests a shift in the typical market behavior of Bitcoin, hinting at potential opportunities for those involved in the digital asset space. Hayes' forecast is significant as it potentially indicates a new era for Bitcoin, stirring discussions among enthusiasts and investors worldwide.

data.title: Risks rise as AI developer tools expand - learn about potential exploits and mitigation strategies. #AIsecurity
data.description: Discover the emergence of security risks from AI-powered developer tools. Understand the vulnerability to exploits and strategies for minimizing risks. Explore further for detailed insights.

data.title: KBRA assigns preliminary ratings to 5 classes of BX 2025-PURE3, a CMBS securitization, backed by a CAD 505 million loan.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to five classes of BX 2025-PURE3, a Canadian CMBS single-borrower securitization. The collateral for this transaction comprises a CAD 505.0 million floating-rate, interest-only mortgage loan. The loan is anticipated to have a two-year initial term with three one-year extension options and necessitates monthly payments. It will be backed by fee simple interests in 37 industrial assets owned by the borrowers.

data.title: Investors of Cytokinetics urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi for claims between Dec 27, 2023 and May 6, 2025. Loss suffered in that time frame, reach out for options.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in Cytokinetics to reach out to him directly to explore their options. If you incurred losses in Cytokinetics within the period of December 27, 2023, to May 6, 2025, and wish to discuss your situation, please contact him.
